---
title: "Processing Ecopath Diet Matrix"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Install Diet Matrix from Lauria 2016

```{r}
ecopath_diet <- read.csv("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/Ecopath-Diet_updated_reformatted.csv")

```

# Redistribute species to create Boarfish and Red Gurnard specific columns

```{r}
#from Lauria 2012, we know that red gurnards compose 37% of the gurnards
#Gurnard row #38
Gurnard<-ecopath_diet[38, ]
num_cols <- 3:67
Red_gurnard<-Gurnard
Other_Gurnards<-Gurnard
Red_gurnard[, num_cols] <- Gurnard[, num_cols] * 0.37
Red_gurnard$Group.name<-"Red gurnard"
Red_gurnard$...1<-66
Other_Gurnards[, num_cols] <- Gurnard[, num_cols] * 0.63


#from Lauria 2012, we know that red gurnards compose 97% of the small pelagic fish spp.
#Boarfish row
Boarfish <- ecopath_diet[41, ]
Boarfish<-Boarfish
Small_pelag<-Boarfish
num_cols <- 3:67
Boarfish[, num_cols]<- Boarfish[, num_cols] * 0.97
Boarfish$Group.name<-"Boarfish"
Boarfish$...1<-67
Small_pelag[, num_cols]<- Boarfish[, num_cols] * 0.03

#Combine rows into diet data
ecopath_diet<-ecopath_diet[-c(38,41),]
ecopath_diet<-rbind(ecopath_diet, Red_gurnard, Boarfish, Other_Gurnards, Small_pelag)
rownames(ecopath_diet) <- NULL

diet<-ecopath_diet[c(1:37,66,38:39,67,40:65),]
rownames(diet) <- NULL

#Now columns
Red_gurnard<-diet[, 40]
Boarfish<-diet[, 43]

diet$X66<-Red_gurnard
diet$X67<-Boarfish

rownames(diet) <- NULL

use_data(diet, overwrite = TRUE)
```
